policy: Only manualExclusions are read by the trainer. Built-in exclusions (topped, 1mm/borderline, unknown folder labels, missing label entries) are encoded in scripts/stage2_pure_fat_policy.mjs and surfaced through summarizeStage2PureFatPolicy. Edit this file only to add or remove a manual exclusion.

manualExclusions.note: Explicit user review found this recording unsuitable as pure-vs-fat training signal.
